title: The Baroque Works Agents Fall
description: On pages 15–18, the baroque works agents fall as luffy, Usopp, and Karoo break Baroque Works’ formation, exposing Mr. 3’s wax armor and freeing the crew from the execution trap.
scene: The Baroque Works Agents Fall. Luffy, Usopp, and Karoo break Baroque Works’ formation, exposing Mr. 3’s wax armor and freeing the crew from the execution trap. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Now's not the time for me to be fashionably enjoying tea!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Nami and the others might be waiting for me to rescue them!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Ah, damn it. I wonder why there's a nice relaxing retreat in the middle of this jungle?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Hello, this is the shitty restaurant.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Would you like to make a reser- Vatican?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Aren't you a little late with your reports...?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Uhh... and whom might this be?

summary: This part centers on the baroque works agents fall, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
